use_cases: Select payment method during e-commerce checkout flow
Choose payment option for subscription or recurring billing
Enable wallet payment selection (Google Pay, Apple Pay) in checkout forms
Collect payment preference in SaaS onboarding or upgrade flows
Support multiple payment providers in fintech applications
ai_summary: A customizable payment method radio selector component featuring SVG icons for digital payment providers like Google Pay. Built as a controlled React input component with customizable options, labels, and callback handlers for form integration. Clean flat visual style with no additional decorations, making it suitable for minimal checkout interfaces and e-commerce platforms.
